title: croton luzoniensis
intro: Croton luzoniensis, also known as Philippine croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton luzoniensis include the treatment of fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
